chapter: Chapter: When People Rebel – 1857 and After

questions.question: Who was the sepoy whose actions helped trigger the Revolt of 1857?
questions.explanation: Mangal Pandey attacked British officers in 1857, which became an early spark for the revolt.

questions.question: Why were many Indian rulers unhappy with British policies before the Revolt of 1857?
questions.explanation: Policies like the Doctrine of Lapse allowed the British to annex Indian states.

questions.question: Who led the revolt in Jhansi during the Revolt of 1857?
questions.explanation: Rani Lakshmibai of Jhansi played a major role in fighting the British during the revolt.

questions.question: Which group formed the largest part of the rebel forces in 1857?
questions.explanation: The rebellion began with sepoys of the British army and they formed the major fighting force.

questions.question: What major administrative change happened after the Revolt of 1857?

options.A: The British Crown took direct control of India
options.C: The East India Company gained more power

questions.explanation: After the revolt, the British government ended East India Company rule and governed India directly.
